title: oenothera strigosa var. procera
intro: Oenothera strigosa var. procera, also known as Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Onagraceae family. It is a tall, erect plant with white or pinkish flowers that typically bloom in the evening and have a sweet fragrance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA) and other fatty acids. The health benefits of Oenothera strigosa var. procera include reducing inflammation, relieving menopausal symptoms, and supporting heart health, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or oils for consumption.
